title: notobuxus benguellensis
intro: Notobuxus benguellensis, also known as Benguelense boxwood, is a shrub or small tree native to Angola. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimalarial and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Notobuxus benguellensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against infections, which can contribute to the prevention of diseases such as malaria and typhoid fever. Herbal preparations of Notobuxus benguellensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting the plant's compounds using solvents to produce a tincture or oil.
